blocks.body: Parts of speech (parts of speech) are the main categories into which all English words are divided according to their function in a sentence. Understanding the parts of speech will help you build sentences correctly.

{ "title": "12. Brief summary", "items": [ "Noun (noun) - names a person, place, thing or idea.", "Verb (verb) - expresses an action or state.", "Adjective (adjective) - describes noun.", "Adverb (adverb) - modifies a verb, adjective or adverb.", "Pronoun (pronoun) - replaces a noun.", "Preposition (preposition) - shows the relationship between words.", "Conjunction (conjunction) - connects words and sentences.", "Interjection (exclamation) - expresses emotions." ] }
